'''''Star Wars: The Official Magazine'' 15''' was the 15th issue of the ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine]]''.

==Contents==
===Departments===
*[[Feel the Force]]
*New Hopes
*[[Star Wars Q&A|Q&A]]
*[[Second Trooper]]: [[Phil Brown|The Man From Uncle]]
*[[Jawa's Corner|Jawas' Corner]]
*Model Universe
*Book Round-up

===Features===
*"[[Pulp Jedi: An Interview with Episode I Star Samuel L. Jackson|Pulp Jedi]]" {{C|from [[Star Wars Insider 38|''Star Wars Insider'' 38]]}}
*"[[The Creative Cosmos of Drew Struzan]]" {{C|retitled "Drawing Inspiration", [[Star Wars Galaxy Collector 1|''Star Wars Galaxy Collector'' 1]]}}
*"''[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|Star Wars: Supremacy]]''" {{C|by [[Brian Boyle]]}}
*:<small>The ''Star Wars Magazine'' guide to LucasArts' epic new strategy game.</small>
*"[[Life Through a Lens]]" {{C|by [[Chris Gardner]]}}
*:<small>[[Albert Clarke]], the set photographer on ''Raiders of the Lost Ark'' and ''Return of the Jedi'', remembers two of his greatest assignments and shares some of his favorite stills.</small>
*"[[Fully Booked]]" {{C|by [[Ian Spelling]]}}
*:<small>Inside [[Lucas Licensing]] with the company's continuity editor [[Allan Kausch]].</small>
*[[Anthony Daniels' Set Diary]]: Bonfire of the Utinies
*:<small>[[Anthony Daniels]] throws a couple of Jawas on the barbie and heads for home.</small>
*[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Saga of Nomi Sunrider|''Tales of the Jedi'']]
*:<small>Beginning a new strip story.</small>
